analysis: The plant appears healthy with no strong visible evidence of disease in the scanned image.
solution: Continue routine care, keep monitoring the leaves, and rescan if discoloration, spots, or unusual growth appear.
careSteps: Maintain stable watering and light conditions
Inspect leaves regularly for new symptoms
prevention: Keep good airflow around the plant and avoid large swings in moisture or humidity.

analysis: Powdery mildew often appears as pale or white powder-like fungal growth on the leaf surface and can spread quickly in humid conditions.
solution: Remove infected leaves where practical, improve airflow, avoid overhead watering, and start an appropriate antifungal treatment.
careSteps: Separate heavily affected plants when possible
Reduce humidity buildup around the foliage
Monitor new growth over the next week
prevention: Space plants well, reduce stagnant humid air, and avoid wetting leaves late in the day.
rescanReason: A follow-up scan helps confirm that fungal spread is slowing after treatment.

analysis: Rust commonly presents as orange, brown, or reddish pustules and can spread through infected plant tissue if left untreated.
solution: Remove the most affected leaves, isolate the plant if needed, and apply a fungicide suitable for rust infections.
careSteps: Dispose of infected leaf material safely
prevention: Keep foliage dry, improve air circulation, and inspect nearby plants for similar symptoms.
rescanReason: A follow-up scan is recommended to verify whether the rust symptoms are improving.

analysis: Blight can cause rapid browning, spotting, or tissue collapse and may progress quickly in wet or poorly ventilated conditions.
solution: Prune infected material promptly, improve airflow, and begin treatment quickly to reduce further spread.
careSteps: Isolate the affected plant if symptoms are spreading rapidly
prevention: Avoid overhead watering, keep tools clean, and remove infected plant debris from the growing area.
rescanReason: A short follow-up interval is recommended because blight can worsen quickly.
